description:
## [1.38.0](https://github.com/Ripthulhu/morphe-youtube/compare/v1.37.1...v1.38.0) (2026-07-20)

### ✨ Features

* **youtube:** add list_suggestions to the Voice Assistant API, returning the related videos for the current video as an ordered list of id, title, channel and duration so they can be chosen by voice
